---

config:
    theme: 'base'
    themeVariables:
        primaryColor: '#1f2020'
        primaryTextColor: '#f0f0f0'
        background: '#333'
        primaryBorderColor: '#888888'
        lineColor: '#999'

---

stateDiagram

state "NORMAL" as NORMAL {

        OFF

        OFF : OFF

        OFF : en / { set_color("#35;CCC"); }

        BLUE

        BLUE : BLUE

        BLUE : en / { set_color("#35;a2f2ff"); }

        YELLOW

        YELLOW : YELLOW

        YELLOW : en / { set_color("#35;fdff71"); }

        %% Initial state name as "." so that it fits in black circle shape.
        %% See https://github.com/StateSmith/StateSmith/issues/404
        state "." as NORMAL.(InitialState)

}

RED

RED : RED

RED : en / { set_color("#35;ff4f4f"); }

RED : INPUT / { beep(); }

%% Initial state name as "." so that it fits in black circle shape.
%% See https://github.com/StateSmith/StateSmith/issues/404
state "." as ROOT.(InitialState)

NORMAL --> RED : ERR

OFF --> BLUE : INC1

OFF --> YELLOW : INC2

BLUE --> OFF : DIMx

BLUE --> YELLOW : INCx

YELLOW --> BLUE : DIM1

YELLOW --> OFF : DIM2

NORMAL.(InitialState) --> OFF

RED --> NORMAL : INCITE_RESET

ROOT.(InitialState) --> NORMAL
StateSmith Simulator
settings delete help
